content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION

P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 16, 2002

David Bauer
400 Capitol Mall, Suite 1560
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-244

Dear Mr. Bauer:

This letter confirms the receipt of your September 6, 2002 request for advice regarding an unnamed independent expenditure committee. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you identify the committee in questions and are an authorized representative of the independent expenditure committee for which you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. Additionally, your inquiries are hypothetical, which under regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), is a circumstance in which the FPPC may decline to provide written advice. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

We encourage you to contact our toll-free help line with questions you may have regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ at 1-866-275-3772.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

JWW/jg

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
